title: Add chunk-load error recovery and cache-busting for static deploys
description:
When a new deploy lands on GitHub Pages, browsers with cached HTML try to load old chunk hashes (e.g. CanvasPage-CGs_lsvZ.js) which 404. This causes an unhandled React Router error screen.

Fixes:
1. Catch dynamic import() failures in the lazy() wrapper and trigger a one-time window.location.reload() to fetch fresh HTML with correct chunk references
2. Consider broader cache-busting measures: custom 404.html that redirects to index, or meta cache-control headers in index.html

title: Fix flash of unstyled content (FOUC) in Viewfinder on deploy
description:
On deployed builds, the Viewfinder (home screen) briefly renders unstyled — raw text, no card layout, no spacing, browser-default link styling. The styled version appears after a moment.

The FOUC shows: unstyled Storyboard title, raw Prototypes/Canvas tabs, plain branch selector, unstyled folder names, plain-text links (Copilot Logged Out Views, external), and an unstyled avatar.

Likely cause: CoreUI Svelte styles or Primer CSS loading asynchronously while the HTML is already painted. May need critical CSS inlining, a loading screen, or visibility:hidden until styles are ready.
